title: Latent Variable Models
summary: Models that involve latent variables, which are variables that are not directly observed but are inferred from the data. It sits inside Statistical Models / Probabilistic Models. Compare it with Markov Processes and Markov Chains. It opens into Latent-Variable PCFG and Latent Variable Coref.
